main.title: Mateus Andrade
main.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
main.description: Building performant, AI-powered applications with React Native, ASP.NET Core, and modern cloud infrastructure.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building mobile and web applications with AI integrations. Graduated in Information Systems from UFOP (2020–2025), I specialize in React Native, ASP.NET Core, and modern cloud-native architectures.
about.description2: I have a track record of delivering measurable results: reducing LLM response times by 70% through async parallelism, and achieving 30% Lighthouse performance improvements via SSR optimization. I thrive in agile teams and am passionate about building products that combine performance, accessibility, and great developer experience.

items: Developing educational gamified app with AI voice agents using React Native + ASP.NET Core
Reduced LLM response time by 70% with async parallelism and streaming in C# .NET
Built complete gamification system with collectibles, progression mechanics, and customization
Implemented native push notifications (FCM/APNs) with scheduling for user retention
Designed scalable RESTful APIs with RabbitMQ/MassTransit for async message processing
Led front-end of City Hall Portal with SSR, Dynamic Routing, and Revalidation in Next.js
Achieved 30% Lighthouse performance improvement through SSR and SEO optimizations
Built accessible design system with reusable components following WCAG guidelines
Implemented complete e-commerce flow: cart, checkout, and JWT authentication
Developed RESTful APIs with Node.js/Express and PostgreSQL database modeling

items.name: Woolly
items.description: Gamified educational app featuring AI-powered voice agents for real-time interactive learning. Backend with async messaging, push notifications, and voice processing pipeline (AssemblyAI STT, Google TTS, OpenAI LLM). PostgreSQL via Supabase with Row Level Security.

education.title: Education
education.institution: UFOP – Federal University of Ouro Preto
